title: Undecided Voters | #shorts
full_text: so Brian you and I are undecided voters but we have to make a decision this is the week so what are we going to do what are you thinking I don't know the issues like uh immigration yeah immigration yeah that's an easy one keep them out keep the immigrants out wait you want to keep the immigrants out yes yeah isn't that a little bit racist yeah it's a lot racist but I'm a discriminating racist I know who to let in and who to let out I can give them the list okay the discriminating racist that's right I think we just discovered a new voter demographic that's s and I'm happy to be of service
